name: MEST Africa
description: One of Africa's premier tech entrepreneurship programs offering training, seed funding, and a pan-African network for software-focused startups.

name: Impact Hub Accra
description: A global network node for social impact startups with a makerspace, event hall, and community cafe. Part of 100+ hubs worldwide.

name: iSpace Foundation
description: Capacity building and community hub focused on women in tech, social entrepreneurship, and developer education.

name: Ghana Tech Lab
description: Government-backed innovation lab with AI, Robotics, and Cybersecurity labs supporting the national digital economy agenda.

name: InnoHub
description: A startup incubator and co-working space serving entrepreneurs across fintech, health, and agritech sectors.

name: ALX Tech Hub
description: Pan-African tech training hub at One Airport Square (4th Floor) offering world-class software engineering, data science, and AI programmes. Alumni network spans 50+ African countries.

name: Kumasi Hive
description: Ghana's leading hardware and AI makerspace. Specializes in rapid prototyping, IoT, and deep tech innovation.

name: hapaSpace
description: A STEM-focused digital innovation hub championing youth entrepreneurship and skill development in the Ashanti Region.

name: Duapa Werkspace
description: The Western Region's startup ecosystem leader, focusing on youth employment and entrepreneurship development.

name: HOPin Academy
description: Bringing entrepreneurial resources to Northern Ghana with a focus on AgriTech, education, and digital literacy.

name: Yison Tech Hub
description: Promoting digital literacy and tech adoption in the Upper West Region of Ghana.

name: Ho Node
description: A digital innovation hub serving the Volta Region, connecting local entrepreneurs to the national tech ecosystem.
